name: vps-hermes
description: A Claude Code plugin that automates the full setup of Hermes Agent on a VPS — from first SSH login to a running Hermes instance.
descriptionKr: VPS에 Hermes Agent를 설치하는 전체 셋업 스킬. 로컬 Tailscale 설치, VPS 유저 생성, Tailnet 구성, SSH 키 설정, Hermes 설치를 순서대로 진행합니다.

skills.name: vps-hermes-setup
skills.description: Step-by-step VPS setup: Tailscale, user creation, SSH key config, and Hermes Agent installation.

requirements: A fresh VPS with root SSH access
An AI agent tool capable of executing shell commands (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot Workspace, or any MCP-compatible agent)

installation.manual: Copy skills/vps-hermes-setup/SKILL.md to your AI agent's skill/prompt directory and invoke it as /vps-hermes-setup
